overview: Frost Walker is a Normal-class Undead monster found in Ice Abyss, Ice Cavern. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 140 HP, 27 physical damage, 50 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 6. 4 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Attack3 at 180% ratio (486 base damage). Nightmare gains 2 exclusive abilityies: Walk Phase, Ice Aoe.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 4 melee attacks. Attack1 (125%), Attack2 (130%), Attack3 (180%), and more.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Poison Cloud
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Poison Cloud icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Fire, Divine
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Fire (-2000), Divine (-2000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Walk Phase, Ice Aoe
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 2 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Walk Phase, Ice Aoe. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 130 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster
Nightmare gains 2 exclusive abilities: Walk Phase, Ice Aoe

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
